_comment: DEFAULT TEMPLATE ONLY — no personal data (owner rule 2026-07-11: personal config never lives in the repo). The real interests live in the PRIVATE `profile` collection (scope 'news', managed via tools/profile.py and filled by AI interview in the setup wizard / any chat); the pipeline prefers that and falls back to this file on fresh forks. 'template' picks the widget in control.html (ticker|headline|summary|hero); 'tickers' adds Yahoo per-symbol news + live quote tags; 'query' searches news.
